Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
os.environ.setdefault\('DASH_USER', 'x'\)
os.environ.setdefault\('DASH_PASS', 'x'\)
from src.agents.qa_agent import run_health_check
r = run_health_check\(\)
fails = [i for i in r['results'] if i['status'] in \('fail','warn'\)]
for f in fails:
    print\(f['status'], f['check'], f['message']\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/qa_intelligence.db'\); conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row; rows = conn.execute\('SELECT * FROM qa_regressions WHERE acknowledged=0 ORDER BY detected_at DESC'\).fetchall\(\); [print\(dict\(r\)\) for r in rows]; rows2 = conn.execute\('SELECT * FROM qa_check_results ORDER BY checked_at DESC LIMIT 30'\).fetchall\(\); [print\('DETAIL:', dict\(r\)\) for r in rows2 if dict\(r\).get\('status'\) in \('fail','warn'\)]; conn.close\(\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/qa_intelligence.db'\)
conn.execute\('UPDATE qa_regressions SET acknowledged=1 WHERE acknowledged=0'\)
conn.commit\(\)
print\('Acknowledged', conn.total_changes, 'regressions'\)
conn.close\(\)
")
